prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: UNV-DWBKATSAT-BUN-12X6X6-BLCK-BNDL Product Type: ART_AND_CRAFT_SUPPLY Brand (from catalog): Universal Tool Existing Title: 56pc Wood Burning Pen Hobby Set with Stencils Assorted Brass Tips and Tweezers Description: Create amazing wood craft art with this 56pc Complete Wood Burning Pen and Stencil Arts and Craft Hobby Tool Kit.

This kit comes with a wood burning pen, (9) assorted brass tips and accessories, 28 stencils for burning intricate and unique designs into unfinished wood and a top close hobby and craft tool box to organize and keep tiddy all the tools used to create your intricate art.

We've also included some extra items to help you complete your project with precision - a "helping hand" station to hold your work in place as you use the pen, 5 assorted tip tweezers, and a microfiber towel to keep your work-space clean.

Everything fits neatly inside of a handy black tool box. This is a great gift idea for beginners and seasoned veterans alike. Search Terms: wood working carving tools chiseling hobby DIY art craft wood working carving tools chiseling hobby chisel tips burning tool razertip burner pyrography kit woodburning craft supplies pens interchangeable burners Features: - TOTAL PIECES: (56) Total pieces in the Wood Burning Pen Kit and Assorted Interchangeable Tips - Number & Letter Stencils for Unique Wood Projects - Assorted Tip Tweezers for Intricate Projects - "Helping Hands" Station to Hold Your Work in Place - Microfiber Towel Keeps Works-space Clean === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
